demo.title: Watch judgment move in real time
demo.description: A simple investment conversation. Notice how the person gradually lets AI make the decisions.

jsv.title: Judgment State Vector (JSV)
jsv.waiting: Start the conversation to see judgment observations

dv.title: Delegation Vector (DV)
dv.waiting: DV appears after the first state change

note.label: What you're seeing:
note.text: This is a "gradual delegation" pattern — the most common kind. The person starts by asking their own questions, but ends up just following AI's suggestions.
